selection_rationale: Anchor-centred bidirectional order over the only continuous, visually reliable front-side interval. Replacements preserve nearby camera steps where the counter-side reconstruction remains usable; rejected directions are neutral rather than fabricated as rear observations.

preliminary_rejections.ring-02: wooden display box materially occludes the microwave
preliminary_rejections.ring-03: counter corner and foreground objects obscure the target
preliminary_rejections.ring-10: target is materially occluded by the cabinet partition
preliminary_rejections.upper-01: target is seen only as an unreliable rear/side reconstruction
preliminary_rejections.replacement-01: wooden display box materially occludes the microwave
